code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  let input = io.read_to_end()
  let n = string.len(input)
  mut i = 0
  mut have = false
  mut max_v = 0
  mut min_v = 0
  mut in_num = false
  mut cur = 0
  mut neg = false
  while i <= n
    mut b = 0
    if i < n
      match string.byte_at(input, i)
      when Some(v)
        b = v
      when None
        b = 32
      end
    else
      b = 32
    end
    let is_digit = b >= 48 and b <= 57
    let is_minus = b == 45
    if in_num
      if is_digit
        cur = cur * 10 + (b - 48)
      else
        let val = if neg
          -cur
        else
          cur
        end
        if not have
          max_v = val
          min_v = val
          have = true
        else
          if val > max_v
            max_v = val
          end
          if val < min_v
            min_v = val
          end
        end
        in_num = false
        cur = 0
        neg = false
      end
    else
      if is_digit
        in_num = true
        cur = b - 48
      else if is_minus
        in_num = true
        neg = true
        cur = 0
      end
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  println("max=#{max_v}")
  println("min=#{min_v}")
end
